name: "Trust Junk" Leads to Unjustified Support for Highly Discriminatory Predictive Models
summary: arXiv:2607.14152v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The persuasive power of data visualizations can go awry: for instance, in an explainable AI (XAI) context, visualizations can produce over-trust of...
description: arXiv:2607.14152v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The persuasive power of data visualizations can go awry: for instance, in an explainable AI (XAI) context, visualizations can produce over-trust of predictive models. In this paper, we use a crowdsourced study to show that providing accurate (but superfluous or irrelevant) data in a model explanation can, in fact, result in unjustified trust and...
author: Michael Correll, Lucy Havens, Mahsan Nourani
